title: For Those We Love
writer: Chester L. Roberts, Arthur Rosson, Perley Poore Sheehan
actors: Betty Compson, Richard Rosson, Camille Astor
plot: Trix Ulner, who deals stud poker at Frank's small-town gambling resort, rescues Bernice Arnold from drowning, and her subsequent acquaintance with him causes scandal and annoys her sweetheart, Johnny Fletcher. When her brother, Ji...
